At the same time , vehicles cannot make left turning from Kwun Tong Road onto Tsui Ping Road.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Affected KMB bus routes nos. 11B, 11C, 13M, 89, 89C, 89X have been diverted.   Traffic is busy now.

Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
